reviews.review_text: fun to play, especially with a friend. even more fun with multiple friends.
just like real golf... great fun until you start playing
♥♥♥♥ game cuz the deep hole 4 has misaligned grassmats and it makes me really mad fix ur game u chudious goys
I prefer Golf It myslef. Good game though. Great for losing friends.

it is a fun game to play with friends, and with the dlc you get a fair few map options. There are also various modes, such as hockey and basket ball modes to add a challenge - and you get a lot of control when customising how you want to play. It is also decent to play by yourself or online, so you don't have to worry about finding someone to play with.

Playing this game feels like your at a casino. Every time you move the golf ball, it fells like there's a 40% chance something bad will happen. It feels like a guessing game. Also, if you plan on 100%-ing this game, be prepared to spend like triple the amount of money you planned on spending, because there are a few maps that require a DLC. That's already kind of stupid, if you buy a game, you should have all of the content inside, but those maps have achievements tied to them, so spending extra money is REQUIRED to 100% the game, which is extremely scummy. I wouldn't mind if they added DLCs that give you cosmetics, if fact, there a a few DLCs which do that, but when you're gatekeeping something like this, it feels unfair to the people who want to get all achievements. Although if you're wondering how well this game performs, all the lowest graphics settings, the game ran quite well on my PC, although when launching the game it can take a while to get to the loading screen.
who ever made the last hole for museum simply hates the people that play their game.
Well, it's quite complicated actually. You play golf... with your friends.
Great game to annoy your friends and rage bait yourself... and good way to test your friendship!
Its Golf.....what else you want me to say , hit the ball , get in the hole ,its Golf but with friends :p
possibly the most consistent game i play with many friends at once, can not wait for 2

If you are looking for a fun game to play with you and your friends then i highly recommend Golf With Your Friends! This game is action packed and never has a dull moment. The game offers 17 maps most of them are free however 2 of them are DLCs, TONS of customization features for your golfballs, and so many fun different modes. You can either love the game or rage at the game depending how good you are. With 46 hours on the game i can confidently say i love this game and highly would recommend this game to anyone thinking about buying it!

Horribly made. Have great memories of it with my friends, but ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥, the game is a glitchy mess.
Get it on discount with friends, otherwise it won't be worth it.

With over 20H on the PS, i had to get this game on the PC.
This is the type of game you play when you feel like chilling with some friends, talking about life or laughing about how bad you are at the game.
You can load up this game when you feel like doing something but without really thinking too much.
The maps are unique and don't feel too repetitive.
I enjoyed this quite a lot.
Really cool game, fun to play and spend a lot of hours in, sadly i have no friends so it's just Golf for me.
The game keeps kicking me out, all the time when i play with my friends.... so i can't play with me friends... :(
This game is really hella fun tbh I can’t wait for golf with friends 2 I don’t play much bc my friends are busy but when I do it’s so much fun
Get this game if you are looking for a coop game to play with your friends. It's a blast with them, but boring by yourself.
just a fantastic game. enough said. will always be a classic
I enjoy playing the different maps in party mode with my friends.  I don't play this by myself but it's probably fun for solitary players as well.
Great relaxing game to play with friends when you’re winding down at the end of the night. I’ve had a lot of fun with it, and I’m really excited for the new one coming out.
Multiplayer game where you put balls I’m holes. Very epic concept. Would play again. Custom maps & cool skins let you choose how you use your balls. 10/10
Very fun game but will cause rage when playing with friends or alone, play at your own risk.
Rennoin ja rauhoittavin peli mitä rahalla saa. Aina on mukavaa ja hauskaa kun kavereitten kanssa vähän puttailee. Fysiikat paremmat mitä irl
Most maps do not allow you to reset your ball which means you always have to wait until it fully stops (also when it falls down a hill). Super annoying and makes it hard to adjust the next shot.
Love this game, just wish they would make it crossplay. Can't be that hard, and I have a lot of friends on console that I would love to play this game with.
Good fun. You don't need to each buy the additional courses in order to play with your friends which is nice.

Golf With Your Friends is one of my favorite party games. Fun and chill right enough. 

Big pro is that it can be enjoyed by non-gamer friends/family members, as early tracks are easy, straightforward and engaging.

Con: you need friends :(

mmmm yeah sure its kinda cool if youys like to smache the ball hole,,, haha hall and bowl go itn. Yeah go ahede smachem, or donet, i guesss can. but do hevy recom ended thi game, vere cool and amazend :)

Great fun to play with the family! Not tried online multiplayer yet but we play this at home with our two kids and it's wonderful. Yes, the graphics aren't great for many of the courses and on a few instances you can get stuck with no obvious way out, but these are minor issues. Well worth buying. Hours of fun!

Really fun mini session game.

Only recommend really if you're going to play it exactly the way the title intends.
With friends.

Can be a fun little game together as a quick session, or a warm up game before delving into something deeper.
No ones lead is guaranteed in this game as the tables can turn quickly on one bad hole.

Peak entertainment. I don't think humanity will evolve past such a height, apart from the soon to be played sequel. It is fun, addictive and challenging. Apart from the dunk gamemode... DONT play the dunk gamemode...
I played with lots of friends. We laughed, we raged, we made some nice trick shots. This game was totally worth it, and still very active during some hrs of the week.

Golf With Your Friends is extremely frustrating (in a good way). Compete and yell at your friends when you're losing the game. Every course is designed for challenging fun, and the different play styles turn it into mini-golf on steroids. Custom game settings allow basketball mode, turning collisions on/off, and more, resulting in dozens of layers of pain to endure at every hole. Well worth the price of admission.

GET IN THE HOLE! I 100% recommend you get this game it is very fun to play with friends. I highly recommend you get it when it goes on sale though because it usually goes down to 10, 5, or 2ish dollars every few months (check steamDB).
Great game for a casual evening with friends. Replay value is phenomenal with the ability to use community made maps.
Its a Really nice and chill game, even though I don't have many close friends to gather and play altogether. The game in single player is simple and efficient, It is good

This could be a great game if:   1) The player could know where the hole is located.  Even using the C key and rising above the course there are certain holes without the hole location being visible.  2) Physics does not exist.  If I send a ball against an object the odds of the ball bouncing the correct direction is a guess.

this game is very very bad, there are many invisible walls, and a few bugs. i lost a bet due to the incompetence of the game creators and i'm out a couple lot of dollars. please do not make life changing decisions based off the results of this game. also collisions are very very annoying, i dont know why you would ever add them. my friends shiv kept trolling me and i want to cry now. not a good experience. do not buy
really fun, but the friends I played with are bunch of jerks
Got this game, made my friends get this game, and then I proceeded to win every match played with my friends, I don't think anyone cares but from now on I am the goat of golf, GULF OF ♥♥♥ IM COMING

This game is absolutely not worth your time. I bought it 90% off and was still dissatisfied. There are more enjoyable free alternatives on ROBLOX of all things. The game concept is fine and the execution is well below average. If it is on a huge sale, you could give it a try. $20 is a completely unacceptable price for a game like this.

Maps are poorly designed and way too gimmicky. If someone has played the map and others haven't they will win every single time. There is not much skill, it really just comes down to memorizing the course. Playing with friends is alright, but you will probably play it once and forget the experience ever happened. Once again, ROBLOX has versions of this game that are more well made and they are completely free. Do not waste your time or money on this.

Physics are SH**

Most buggy, ass-designed game to ever release on steam
you could be deceived that this game is good, and it does have some fun mechanics and maps. But some maps are just excrutiatingly relentless and based on luck !!!!! RAGHGRR

This is not golf.
This is a psychological endurance test disguised as a party game.

After every hole it politely pops up: +4 OVER PAR 😊
Thank you game.
I noticed.
I noticed after the 7th time my ball bounced off a windmill, hit a wall, launched into orbit, and landed somewhere off the course like I’m trapped in some kind of golf-themed torture punishment.

And the ENTIRE time the game plays this happy little royalty-free ukulele music like I’m on a family vacation instead of entering cardiac arrest.

This game is ridiculous with the pars and a lot of the maps are "You missed, wait an entire minute before you are allowed to shoot again." If you like those old flash games of "Unfair Mario" or anything like that this game is for you, but it's just not my thing.
Amazing... some of the maps, on mac, especially the purchasable ones, are a little visually busted.
Like 80% of these hours were spent by me playing alone because all of my friends really suck at golf, which made Golf Without Friends more interesting than Golf With Friends
I either lose my mind playing or have the easiest time and its amazing.
Golf with friends is so fun i cant wait for Golf with Friends 2 to come out

This is a game where the line between fun and hatred is thinner than a razor’s edge.
Here, you find out how quickly a friend can become your greatest rival.
Wanna try it out yourself? 
GOOD LUCK, you'll need it!
